heavyDependencies.name: chart.js
heavyDependencies.rationale: Charting code is often only needed on a subset of screens.
heavyDependencies.recommendation: Register only the chart primitives you use and lazy load dashboard surfaces.

recommendedFix.title: Register only the chart primitives you use and lazy load dashboard surfaces.

evidence.detail: static import; Charting code is often only needed on a subset of screens.

heavyDependencies.name: react-icons
heavyDependencies.rationale: Wide icon-pack imports can defeat tree shaking.
heavyDependencies.recommendation: Import narrowly from specific icon files or migrate to a more tree-shakable icon set.

recommendedFix.title: Import narrowly from specific icon files or migrate to a more tree-shakable icon set.

evidence.detail: static import; Wide icon-pack imports can defeat tree shaking.

heavyDependencies.name: lodash
heavyDependencies.rationale: Root lodash imports are a classic source of tree-shaking misses.
heavyDependencies.recommendation: Use per-method imports or switch to lodash-es when the toolchain supports it.

recommendedFix.title: Use per-method imports or switch to lodash-es when the toolchain supports it.

evidence.detail: static import; Root lodash imports are a classic source of tree-shaking misses.

recommendedFix.title: Deduplicate lodash to one installed version.

lazyLoadCandidates.name: chart.js
lazyLoadCandidates.recommendation: Register only the chart primitives you use and lazy load dashboard surfaces.
lazyLoadCandidates.reason: chart.js is statically imported in UI surfaces that usually tolerate lazy loading

recommendedFix.title: Register only the chart primitives you use and lazy load dashboard surfaces.

lazyLoadCandidates.name: react-icons
lazyLoadCandidates.recommendation: Import narrowly from specific icon files or migrate to a more tree-shakable icon set.
lazyLoadCandidates.reason: react-icons is statically imported in UI surfaces that usually tolerate lazy loading

recommendedFix.title: Import narrowly from specific icon files or migrate to a more tree-shakable icon set.

lazyLoadCandidates.name: lodash
lazyLoadCandidates.recommendation: Use per-method imports or switch to lodash-es when the toolchain supports it.
lazyLoadCandidates.reason: lodash is statically imported in UI surfaces that usually tolerate lazy loading

recommendedFix.title: Use per-method imports or switch to lodash-es when the toolchain supports it.

treeShakingWarnings.message: Root lodash imports often keep more code than expected in client bundles.
Root react-icons imports can make tree shaking unreliable.
treeShakingWarnings.recommendation: Import from the specific icon pack path instead.

recommendedFix.title: Import from the specific icon pack path instead.

impact.summary: High impact: the project has clear opportunities to reduce initial payload size.
